IGUI_SayPlayer_NoOneAround: There is nobody around to speak to.
IGUI_SayPlayer_Dream_9: I think I know this place!
IGUI_SayPlayer_Dream_11: This is my house! I remember!
IGUI_Artifact_ColdPassage: Cold Passage and The Management of Death
IGUI_Artifact_EarlyMortuaryPractice: On Environmental Determinants of Early Mortuary Practice
IGUI_Artifact_PaleolithicSurveyGroup: Report on the Composition of the Paleolithic Survey Group
IGUI_Artifact_EffectsRadiation: Summary of Health Effects of Ionizing Radiation by ATSDR
IGUI_Artifact_GX9: MASS-GENFAC CO. Voltek GX-9 Diesel Generator
IGUI_Artifact_FinneganStaffListing: Finnegan Research Group - Clinical Operations Division - Staff Listing
IGUI_Bandits_Speech_ZSReloading_Female_2: Cover me! I need to reload!
IGUI_Bandits_Speech_ZSUpstairs_Female_21: Hostile on on the upper floor.
IGUI_Bandits_Speech_BWOARadioCall_Female: Dave, this is Emma. I need you to answer. Over.
Dave, Eli, Martha, Luke. Please respond. Over.
Dave, Eli, Martha, Luke. What is your status? Over.
Dave, it’s me. Please respond. Over.
Dave, if you can hear this, please come back now. Over.
Dave, Bob is awake, I repeat, Bob is awake. Over.
Dave, what is your location? Over.
Dave, do you need help? Answer, please. Over.
Dave, I need you here. Over.
IGUI_Missions_1_Description:
Find and talk to Emma.
Press "T" to open chat panel.
IGUI_Missions_2_Description: Find and wear a bunker suit.
IGUI_Missions_3_Description:
Find an air vent located on the surface
and fix it using a screwdriver.
IGUI_Missions_4_Description: Go outside and find at least one basement with a hidden entrance in the floor.
IGUI_Missions_5_Description: Bring a zombie corpse to the laboratory and place it on the autopsy table.
IGUI_Missions_6_Name: Bring fuel truck to the Ark
IGUI_Missions_6_Description:
Fuel truck is located on Dixie Highway leading to Muldraugh Ruins.
Bring the truck home and pump the fuel to the underground tank.
IGUI_Missions_7_Name: Find and bring back the missing tool bag
IGUI_Missions_7_Description: The bag is located in the remainings of the Community Center in March Ridge Ruins.
IGUI_Missions_8_Description:
Locate Dave's group. Their last know location is south east of Rosewood Ruins.
They planned to stop at one of the houses on their way back to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_9_Description:
Those who killed Dave and Martha, must have a shelter nearby.
Investigate basements of big buildings in Rosewood Remains.
IGUI_Missions_10_Description:
You've found a car key.
It suggests a working vehicle may be nearby.
IGUI_Missions_11_Description:
Emma wants some music.
Bring a working jukebox to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_12_Description:
Emma mentioned she plays the piano.
Find one, and bring it to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_13_Description: Bringing more VHS tapes to the Ark will help you and Emma chill together.
IGUI_Missions_14_Description: Bring a human corpse to the laboratory and place it on the autopsy table.
IGUI_Missions_50_Description:
Emma left the Ark. Find her!
You remember her mentioning something about the warehouses near Muldraugh.
IGUI_Missions_51_Description: You found Emma. Now, bring her to the Ark safely.
IGUI_Missions_100_Name: Go to church in Fallas Lake
IGUI_Missions_100_Description: The voice in your dream points you to Fallas Lake church.
IGUI_Missions_101_Name: Investigate the church in Ekron Ruins
IGUI_Missions_101_Description: According to the priest's note in Fallas Lake, church in Ekron hides some secrets.
IGUI_Missions_102_Description: Comfrey plays some role in all of this. Find it using foraging skills and knowledge of Medicinal Plants. Plant it
IGUI_Missions_103_Description: Grow and harvest a healthy comfrey plant.
IGUI_Missions_110_Description: The voice in your dream points you now to the secret lab near Rosewood Ruins.
IGUI_Missions_111_Description:
One of the research team's home addresses points to a location that can be reached.
Conduct thorough investigation of the house.
IGUI_Missions_112_Description: You found some syringes with an unknown substance. Bring them back to Emma.
IGUI_Missions_113_Name: Leave the syringe in the lab
IGUI_Missions_113_Description: Place the syringe with the unknown substance somewhere in the lab.
IGUI_Missions_114_Description:
If you get infected, Emma will have no choice and give you the drug to test it first.
This way you protect Emma from potential side effects of the experimental cure if she was bitten first.
IGUI_Missions_115_Description: Inject yourself with the experimental anti-viral compound.
IGUI_Missions_120_Description: Conduct a thorough search of C-level executives office suite in of Finnegan HQ in Louisville Ruins.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1_A: My name is Emma. I'm a survivor, just like you. I'm a doctor.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.1_Q: How did you get in here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.1_A: It's a long story. I was rescued, just like you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2_Q: Are there any other people here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2_A: Yes, but they had to leave for various reasons.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.1_Q: Why did the others have to leave?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.1_A: This place requires maintenance, and we needed supplies. They went out to get them, but don't worry, things are under control.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.1.1_Q: Can I help with any of the issues here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.1.1_A: Take your time and rest first. When you're ready, feel free to look around. We'll talk about the details later. I can promise, you'll not get bored.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.2_Q: When will the others come back?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.2_A: Soon, I hope. Don't worry, we're in regular radio contact.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3_Q: How many of you live here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3_A: It's me, four others and you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.1_Q: Who are the others living here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.1_A: There's David, Luke, Martha, and Eli.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.1.2_A: Luke is our scientist. He works with me in the lab.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.1.3_A: Martha takes care of our crops and food supplies.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.1.4_A: Eli's our mechanic. He keeps this place running.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.2_Q: Do we have enough supplies for everyone?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.2_A: We have some scarce food reserves, but we also grow crops locally. It's not much, but we're managing.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1.2.3.2.1_A: An Oligocene aquifer provides us with a steady water supply.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2_A: You're safe. Don't worry. You're in a shelter.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2.1_A: Yes, as safe as we can be, given the circumstances, for now at least.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2.2_A: We're not entirely sure. It's some kind of military bunker we were lucky to find. It seems to have been built by a strange organization for long-term survival.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2.2.1_Q: Tell me more about the organization that built this place.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2.2.1_A: We have an archive with tapes you can listen to. They tell the history of this place.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2.3.1.1.1_A: David is our leader. He was the one that found me.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3_A: We found you unconscious and brought you here. Relax, you're safe now.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1_A: This may be a shock to you... You were in a coma for a couple of months.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1.1_A: In the chaos of the last days. You were lucky we were there too.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1.1.1_Q: How did you know you could trust me, that I wasn't dangerous?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1.1.1_A: We've all done things. But we all deserved a second chance.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1.1.1.1_Q: So, you're not afraid of me?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.1.1.1.1.1_A: Nah. I might still need you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2_A: You had a head injury when we found you. You're lucky we had the equipment and the people to help. Your head may still ache, and your body might feel weak.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1_Q: What exactly did you do to my head?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1_A: We had to perform a craniotomy to treat internal bleeding.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.1_Q: I still have a terrible headache.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.1_A: Here, take some pills. I was worried your motor and speech functions might be affected, but you're fine. The headache will pass.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.1.1_A: Get some rest first. When you're ready, you can look around and take what you need.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2_Q: I don't remember who I was.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2_A: That's normal in your situation. It will take time before memories come back to you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2.1_Q: Did I have anything with me that would help me remember who I was?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2.1_A: Nothing unique. We had to burn everything for safety reasons.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2.2_Q: I don't know what my name is.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.1.2.2_A: Well, I hope your memories will come back to you. Anyway, you look like a Bob to me.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.2_A: According to your blood tests, you're not. You're also immune to the airborne strain of the virus.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.2.1_Q: How were you able to test my blood?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.2.1_A: We have a lab here. And I'm a doctor, remember?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3.2.2.2_A: Yeah. At this point, everyone who's still human is considered immune.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_4_A: Relax. You are in shock. Let's talk more and I'll leave you alone.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5_Q: Are there any other survivors outside the base?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5_A: Yes. There are some living underground.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1_Q: Can we help other the people living outside?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1_A: We tried that, it's risky. It's been a long time since the event and most of them became very hostile.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1_Q: Are those living outside a threat to us?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1_A: In fact they are. It's either us or them now, you know.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1.1_Q: I want to go out and find other people. Where exactly should I go?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1.1_A: You would need to check the surrounding houses. Some of them have hidden entrances in the floor to the basements. Again, I need to warn you, this is dangerous. Don't go unless you are well prepared.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1.1.1_Q: I found a basement. What a mess!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_5.1.1.1.1_A: I know, it's ugly. This is the reality now.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1_Q: I found a room with loud machinery.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1_A: Engineering room. That's where power generators and water pump is located.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.1_Q: How do I use the water pump?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.1_A: It's not connected to the central computer, so it has to be turned on and off manually. Eli tried to fix it, but he gave up.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2_Q: How do I use the power generators?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2_A: Generators are operated by Noah - a central computer. However, fuel is added manually through an inlet on the surface.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.1_Q: Why do we have two generators?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.1_A: Redundancy for safety reasons. But also, we switch to backup one, when we need to fix the main one.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2_Q: How much fuel do we have left?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2_A: The only way to check is to use Noah - the central computer.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2.1_Q: What happens if we run out of fuel?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2.1_A: That would be a disaster. Central heating would shut down and we would freeze to death within hours.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2.1.1_Q: How do we get more fuel?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2.1.1_A: Fuel is a scarce resource. Our intel shows that there is a fuel truck located on Dixie Highway leading to Muldraugh Ruins. Can you get it here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.1.2.2.1.1.1_: I brought the truck, Emma. We have the fuel for the generator.
Amazing! I have to admit, I was worried about you a little. I'm happy that you made it, and I'm happy for the fuel too.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.2_Q: I found Noah, a computer of some kind.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.2_A: Great find! Noah controls and monitors many systems in the base. I'd advise caution before changing anything.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.3_A: Perfect! Enjoy the food, but also take care of the plants.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.4_A: Nice! Did you find anything interesting?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.4.1_A: I like crime novels in general.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.5_A: Yep. It's been here since before us.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.5.1_Q: How can you still believe after all of this?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.5.1_A: To be honest, faith is all we might have left.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6_Q: I think I found a laboratory.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6_A: Yes! It's where we conduct our research.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1_Q: What kind of research are you conducting?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1_A: Well. We are trying to understand the virus so maybe we can do something about it.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1.1_Q: Are you saying you are looking for a cure?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1.1_A: I don't know. But we have to start somewhere.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1.1.1_Q: I brought a zombie corpse to the lab.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.1.1.1_A: Awesome. I will conduct the research soon. I hope it will bring us some useful insights.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.2_Q: I brought a corpse of the non-infected to the lab.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.6.2_A: Good. I will continue my research shortly. We need to understand why some of us remain uninfected.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.7_Q: I found the bedroom. Can I sleep there?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.7_A: Yes, choose the bed you want.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.7.1_Q: There are beds with personal items of more than 5 people in bedroom.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.7.1_A: I knew you would notice that at some point. Yes, there were more of us. But they are dead, ok?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8_Q: I found the armory. Can I get some guns?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8_A: You bet! While it may not seem so, we're still in Kentucky.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8.1_Q: There are hazmat suits in the armory, why would we need them?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8.1_A: They are crucial when we need to go outside. They protect you from the radiation.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8.1.1_Q: What radiation are you speaking about?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.8.1.1_A: Oh right, I forgot you don't remember things. It's the nuclear fallout. I'm sorry, but the world as you knew is now gone. When you're ready, you can go outside and see for yourself. Just be careful there!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.9_A: Yes. It's a crucial function of the Ark. Everything and everyone that comes from the outside must be decontaminated.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.10_Q: I think we need more tools.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.10_A: Good observation. We lost some of our tools during one of our recent scavenge missions. There is a bag full of tools in what is left of the Community Center in March Ridge. Can you get it back for us?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_100.10.1_A: Great news! Thanks! You never know when one of these will become handy, you know?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_200.1_A: I quit. But, I do carry one last with me. Here, enjoy.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_200.1.2_Q: Why did you carry a cigarrete if you quit?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_200.1.2_A: I planned to smoke it after getting bit. But it never happened.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_200.2_Q: I can barely see. Do you have my glasses?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_220.2_A: Take one of these pills. It will help you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_220.3_A: Don't be a kid! There's a lot of things to do and keep you busy.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_220.4_Q: I would kill for a cigarette.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_220.4_A: Sounds like a plan! Go kill some zombies. With a little luck, you will find some cigarettes on them.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_220.5_A: Dead corpses sickness. Get rid of the corpses, there's a chute in the exit corridor.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1_Q: Have you heard from the others?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1_A: Radio has been silent for some time now. I'm worried. Something is wrong.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1.1_Q: What's the last known location of Dave's group?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1.1_A: They were on their way back and they passed Rosewood Ruins already. They planned to make a final stop at one of the houses on the way here.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1.1.1_Q: Emma, Dave and Martha are dead. I'm so sorry...
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.1.1.1.1_Q: I will revenge Dave and Martha. I promise!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.2_Q: Emma, I killed those bastards who killed Dave and Martha.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.2_A: That's... that's good, I guess. But it won't bring them back...
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.2.1_Q: I also found a working car.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.2.1_A: Wow! That's great news! That seriously increases our range of operation.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.3_Q: I never had a chance to thank you for saving me.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.3.1_Q: Thanks for taking care of me while I was in coma.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.3.1_A: You're welcome. I knew you'd wake up one day.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4_Q: You've been here quite a bit. Aren't you bored?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4_A: I've been busy with various things most of the time. But I have to admit, I miss other fun activities.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1_Q: What fun activities are you missing in here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1_A: Oh you know, I love books and I've been reading them here for some time. However I miss music and dancing. I used to go to clubs and dance the night away. I miss that a lot.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.1_Q: Why can't you dance in here?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.1_A: I could, but without music, it's not the same. I wish we had music in here!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.2_Q: Besides books and clubbing, is there anything else you like to do for fun?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.2_A: Piano. I used to play the piano. How I wish we had one here!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.3_Q: What about movies? Do you like to watch them too?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.4.1.3_A: Sure. But we only have a few in here and I've already watched them millions of times. I wish we had more.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.5_Q: Emma, what would we do if we ever lose the Ark?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.5_A: I hope it never comes to that. But if it does, we would have to find another shelter. My first stop would be the warehouses south-west from Muldraugh.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.5.1_Q: Why would you want to go to the warehouses south-west from Muldraugh?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_300.5.1_A: My uncle used to work there when I was a kid. I know the place pretty well. I used to play in the underground there.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.1_Q: What are your virus research results so far?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.1_A: I'm still constructing a working model. This pathogen doesn't behave like anything in modern virology. It preserves certain functions while degrading others. It's almost selective in what it keeps. There's intent in the pattern, or something close to it. I need physical data to move forward.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.2_A: I've completed the autopsy. The body is failing, but not entirely. Motor function persists despite catastrophic neural loss. There's no centralized brain activity that explains movement. It's as if something else has taken over coordination at a lower level. I don't understand how, but it's consistent. I need human specimen to continue.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.3_Q: Any new updates regarding our research?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.3_A: This subject is different. There are clear markers of exposure, but no full conversion. The organism was present, but it never took hold. Something prevented the transition entirely. I can confirm immunity, but I have no idea what caused it. We need new clues.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.4_Q: How is the research going? Are we close?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.4_A: I've analyzed the sample, it's the original strain, and I think I understand now. This version doesn't destroy the host, it integrates with it. The immune subject wasn't naturally resistant, they were pre-exposed. Injected, most likely. The symbiotic strain prevented the aggressive one from taking over.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.4.1_Q: Would that mean that we were also pre-exposed? Injected with the symbiotic strain?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.4.1_A: Now that is a very good question, Bob.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.5_Q: Got any news on the ongoing research?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.5_A: Yep. You will not believe this. The comfrey extract is doing more than slowing the process, it's reversing it. At least in early-stage samples. Even post-exposure tissue is stabilizing. If this holds, it could work after a bite. But I need to be certain. This has to be tested on someone.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6_A: This is it. I've completed the experimental counter to the infection. It doesn't remove the organism, but it forces it back into a stable state. In theory, it should work even after exposure. I've prepared couple of doses.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.1_Q: Are you sure it will work?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.1_A: I can't be sure until it is tested. If any of us gets bitten we can try it on ourselves.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.1.1_Q: I want to test it on myself.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.1.1_A: No. Not now. That's unnecessary risk!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.2_A: Oh no! How did this happen?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.2.1_Q: It just happened. I need to take the counter now.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_400.6.2.1_A: We have no choice. Gosh, I hope it works. Inject it immediately!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.1_A: The central heating must be off. We should fix it before we freeze to death!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.2_A: Shit! We need to check the generator and fuel levels!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.3_Q: I feel sick. What's going on?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.3_A: Gosh! It seems like radiation poisoning.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.3.1_Q: How can we recover from radiation poisoning?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.3.1_A: Take some potassioum iodine pills immediately!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.4_A: Check the CO2 levels and make sure the ventilation is working!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.5_Q: I've noticed CO2 levels are rising despite ventilation being turn on!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.5_A: We need to check the air intake on the surface!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_1000.5.1_A: Good! CO2 levels should be dropping now.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.1_A: It's ok, it's just a dream. You're safe here.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.2_Q: I had a bad dream again. I am beginning to remember things...
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.2_A: Sorry to hear that, but on the bright side, your memories are returning.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.3_Q: Dream again. Now, I remember what happened to me.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.3_A: What did you dream about exactly?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.3.1_Q: My last dream was about me surrounded by zombies with little chance of survival.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.3.1_A: Yes, that's when we found you. You were moments away from getting bitten. Hopefully we got to you in time.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4_Q: My dreams are changing. I heard some voice.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4_A: Take it easy. Your mind may still need time to adjust.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4.1_Q: I'm not crazy. My dreams are not my imagination. It felt very real.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4.1_A: Okay. What did the voice say to you?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4.1.1_Q: In my dream, the voice told me about a shattered seal... And about a judgement of some kind.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.4.1.1_A: I'm a doctor, but not a shrink.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5_A: Stop! I don't want to hear that crazy stuff! You need to get back to reality!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1_Q: Emma, I found a friendly survivor in Ekron.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1_A: Careful! It's better not to trust anyone!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1_Q: I know. He's a priest and he didn't want to come with me anyway.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1_A: A priest? Who would have thought that there would be a priest left in this world.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1.1_Q: The priest pointed to some documents that speak about comfrey.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1.1_A: That plant? This seems unrelated to our cause. Honestly, waste of time.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1.1.1_Q: I know, but you're the one who mentioned faith as the only thing you have left.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1.1.1_A: Okay. But what exactly do you want us to do regarding comfrey.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.1.1.1.1.1: I am going to find it.
You're joking... The ecosystem has collapsed. You've seen the world, right?
If I can't find the plant, then I will find the seeds.
Theoretically, some seeds may have survived. You could grow it here.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.2_Q: Took a while, but I managed to grow some comfrey.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.5.2_A: I nearly forgot about that. Bring it to the lab. I will see what I can do with it.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.1_Q: Emma, my dreams led me to a secret laboratory, and I learned something important about the virus.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.1_A: What did you learn? Please, tell me.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.1.1_Q: The virus isn't new. Ancient texts mention rituals that could be connected to it.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.1.1.1_Q: The rituals weren't just symbolic. They had problems with the dead...
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.2_Q: I found out that Soviets investigated the area where the ancient culture performed the rituals.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.2.1_Q: The Soviets conducted excavations there. In the permafrost, they discovered some kind of preserved organism.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.2.1_A: And you think that's the same organism responsible for what happened here.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.2.1.1_Q: I know that the Soviet research was later studied here, in the lab I visited.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.2.1.1_A: Did you find anything more concrete in that lab? If not, it might be worth investigating further.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.3_Q: Emma, I saw the documents. I have proof they brought the virus here!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.3_A: Shit! I knew it! There's always a bunch of assholes who screw everything up.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.3.1_Q: Apparently, our government had an agent in the Soviet excavation group.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.3.1_A: Well... that's taxpayer money at work. First the Soviets, now our own idiots.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4_Q: I have a list of all the assholes who worked at that lab.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1_Q: One of the doctors from the lab was named Cortman. He had a clinic in Muldraugh.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1_A: That super old rich prick? Interesting. I wonder if you should pay him a visit.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1.1_Q: I found out that Cortman injected himself with some suspicious substance.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1.1_A: Do you know what it was? Did you find any trace of that substance there?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1.2_Q: Cortman's house had a secret room and I think I might have found the substance he injected himself with.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.6.4.1.2_A: I need to investigate it. Put it in the lab. This may lead us somewhere.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7_Q: I think I know how it all started.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7_A: Let me guess. Another dream? Well, last time you were right, so I'm all ears.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7.1_Q: It's not just Cortman. There were others injecting themselves.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7.1.1_Q: They were all part of some kind of cult.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7.1.1_A: We need to understand what that substance is.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7.1.1.1_Q: Longevity. That's what that substance is all about.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.7.1.1.1_A: It must be connected to the zombie outbreak.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9_Q: Emma, I need to go to Louisville.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9_A: Are you crazy? You will never make it there alive! Why do you want to go there?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1_Q: I know that Finnegan Research Group headquarters hide some secrets.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1_A: I won't stop you, will I? I'm going with you!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1.1_Q: I need to go alone. You stay here.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1.1_A: I don't want you to go!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1.1.1_Q: I need to go. I will come back. I promise.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2000.9.1.1.1_A: I'll kick your ass if you don't!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9_Q: Emma, I need to tell you something.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9.1_Q: You know my dreams reveal the truth, right?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9.1.1_Q: I've just learned something difficult about my past.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9.1.1.1_Q: I remember who I was. I worked at Finnegan Research Group.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9.1.1.1.1_Q: I was part of the team that produced the virus.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_2001.9.1.1.1.1.1: Go away! I don't want to see you anymore!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1_Q: Enough of that bullshit. I'm taking you home.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1_A: I told you I wanted to be alone. Why did you come?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1_Q: I came because I care about you. Let's go!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1_A: Just like you cared about everyone else when you killed them with your brilliant medicine?
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1.1_Q: I did what I did, I don't know why, and I'm sorry!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1.1.1_Q: You said that everyone deserves a second chance. So here I am!
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1.1.1_A: That would be a third chance for you, you asshole.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1.1.1.1_Q: Well that asshole just came to save you.
IGUI_Dial_Emma_Robinson_3000.1.1.1.1.1.1: You would not, you need me. And I need you.
You are the only reason I keep going.
And you were the only reason I kept going too.
We'll talk later, we're heading home. Get ready.
Fine! Let's go. But you're still such an asshole.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_1_A: My name is Father James. I have nothing to give. You can have my life, that is all what is left.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_2.1_Q: How long have you been here?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_2.1.1_Q: This place was sealed, how did you get in here?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_2.1.1_A: I bricked up the entrance and myself in here.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3_Q: Father, you don't need to be here. We have a shelter. Come with me!
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3_A: This place is where I belong.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1_Q: Father James. Please, allow yourself to be saved!
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1_A: We are already saved by our Lord. I need not more salvation. Why are you here anyway?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1_Q: I was guided by a voice speaking about the sin and a shattered seal.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1_Q: It spoke about something about a judgement and a dark end.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1_A: You have been through a lot my child.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.1_Q: I believe that my dreams hold a greater meaning
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.1_A: It's not a coincidence you are here. Truely you are guided.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.1.1_A: The answer must be here. Seek and you shall find.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.2_Q: I lost my memory, I was in a coma.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.2_A: Maybe it had to be that way.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3_Q: I have seen terrible things Father.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3_A: We all did. Trust in the Lord and protect what you hold dear.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3.1_Q: Actually Father. There is someone I need to protect now.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3.1_A: Save her and you will save the world.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3.1.1_Q: How did you know it's her?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_3.1.1.1.3.1.1_A: Son, I see it in your eyes. You are in love. That is why you will win.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4_Q: I read a note that led me here.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1_Q: What kind of meetings were held in this place?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1_A: We tried to stop it, but we failed. May God have mercy on our souls.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1.1_Q: How exactly did you try to stop it?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1.1_A: We studied old documents. We suspected this was not the first time. We searched for a way to prevent it — but we failed. May God have mercy on our souls.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1.1.1_Q: Please tell me more, Father. What documents? Can I do something?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1.1.1_A: The Eastern Church wrote of it. We believed it to be a syncretism of faith and local tradition, but it carried a deeper meaning. All signs pointed to cleansing rituals using herbs, most notably comfrey. They used it because they struggled with the dead. Do you understand?
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_4.1.1.1.1_A: I am no scientist, my child. But if you still have hope, what I have said may guide you. Look at the note on the table.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_5_Q: Thank you, Father. I must go now.
IGUI_Dial_Father_James_5_A: May God bless you on your journey, my son.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_1_A: Welcome back Mr Keller. How are you feeling?
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_2_Q: I feel confused. Who the hell are you?
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_2_A: I'm dr Noah Whitlock. I've been helping you.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_3_Q: I don't recognize this place. Where are we?
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_4_Q: That's not possible. There's nothing outside the Ark...
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_4_A: Mr Keller. I'm going to walk you through this, step by step. You've been through a lot.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_5_Q: If we were really outside, there would be...
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_5_A: Destruction. Infection. The dead. Radiation. You've told me about all of it.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_6_A: Yes. Many times. It's alright if you don't remember. Each time, we make a little more progress. But you always choose to go back.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_7_A: For a long time, the Ark was the only one you had.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_8_Q: This doesn't feel real. I must be dreaming again.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_8_A: This place is real, and everything you are experiencing now is real.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_9_Q: If this is real then how did I get in here?
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_9_A: You came back. More precisely, your mind did.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_10_Q: I don't understand. Just tell me clearly.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_10_A: Alright. The Ark is something created to protect you. A place to hide from what happened.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_11_A: Bob... I need you to stay with me now. This will hurt. You lost your family. Months ago. Your mind buried that memory. It couldn't carry it. This was a self defense mechanism.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_12_A: That's a natural response. Last time, this is where you shut down. But now, you're still here.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_13_Q: Wait... the dreams... I remember... God...
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_13_A: Take your time. You're doing well.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_13.1_A: It's very real, to you. I have constructed it for you. Not as an engineer, but as your doctor. The Ark acts like a shelter for your trauma, where the healing process takes place.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_13.2_Q: I think... my family was murdered...
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_13.2_A: That is correct. It happened at your house. You weren't there. You were working late. The guilt became too much and it lead to your condition.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_14_A: She's your daughter. When you lost your family, you lost the whole world. The destroyed world pictures that. But you couldn't let her go. So you brought her with you. You gave her a role. Someone who could guide you. Keep you alive.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_15_Q: So... all of this... is a therapy?
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_15_A: Yes. We tried many approaches. In one, we gave you a mission to stop the nuclear attack. But it did not work. You needed a world that matched how you felt.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_15.1_A: They are the other people. Monsters who killed your family. Maybe other people you could no longer trust. You dehumanized them. Maybe except for one.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_15.1.1_A: Yes, Father James. He also tried to help you.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_15.2_A: Your job. You blamed yourself, but also them for what happened.
IGUI_Dial_Noah_Whitlock_16_A: That's up to you. When you leave this room... you may return to the Ark. Or you may stay here. Your mind will make that choice for you. If you go back, you'll forget this again. But the pain will be less. And we'll meet again. Just like we always do.
